_comment: Verified scores for matches the openfootball feed hasn't published yet. Maintained automatically by the daily scheduled task, which web-searches reputable sources (ESPN, FIFA.com, Olympics.com, Yahoo Sports, NBC, CBS, Sky Sports, Washington Post) and cross-checks each scoreline against >=2 independent outlets before writing it here. The build ALWAYS prefers the live feed, so each entry becomes a harmless no-op once the feed catches up (and can be deleted any time). Match keys (date + team1 + team2) must match the openfootball feed exactly — including play-off placeholder names like 'UEFA Path A winner'.

matches.source: Mexico 2-0 South Africa — ESPN/FIFA/CNN/CBS/NBC
South Korea 2-1 Czechia (Czech Republic = UEFA Path D winner) — ESPN/FOX/Sky Sports
USA 4-1 Paraguay (Balogun brace, Pulisic, Reyna) — FIFA/NBC/Yahoo/Olympics.com/SBS
Canada 1-1 Bosnia & Herzegovina (= UEFA Path A winner; Lukic for BIH 21', Larin 78' for Canada) — Yahoo/Olympics.com/SBS
Qatar 1-1 Switzerland (Embolo 17' pen for SUI, Khoukhi 90+4' for QAT — Qatar's first-ever WC point) — ESPN/Goal.com/101GreatGoals
Brazil 1-1 Morocco (Saibari for MAR, Vinicius Jr equaliser for BRA) — Yahoo/ESPN
Haiti 0-1 Scotland (John McGinn 28' — Scotland's first WC win since 1990) — ESPN/FOX Sports/FIFA.com/VAVEL
Australia 2-0 Türkiye (= UEFA Path C winner; Irankunda 27', Metcalfe 75') — Washington Post/ESPN/FIFA.com/Yahoo
Germany 7-1 Curaçao (Havertz brace; Comenencia 21' for Curaçao's first-ever WC goal) — ESPN/Sky Sports/Opta Analyst/FIFA.com
Ivory Coast 1-0 Ecuador (Amad Diallo 90') — NBC News/Sky Sports/ESPN/FIFA.com/Sports Mole
Netherlands 2-2 Japan (Van Dijk & Summerville for NED; Nakamura & Kamada 89' for JPN) — NBC Sports/ESPN/Bolavip
Sweden 5-1 Tunisia (= UEFA Path B winner; Ayari brace) — ESPN/Yahoo/RotoWire/NBC
Belgium 1-1 Egypt (Ashour 19' for EGY; Hany own goal 66' forced by sub Lukaku) — ESPN/FOX Sports/Sky Sports/FIFA.com
Iran 2-2 New Zealand (Elijah Just brace for NZ; Mohebbi & Rezaeian for IRN) — ESPN/FOX Sports/FIFA.com/World Soccer Talk
Spain 0-0 Cape Verde (Vozinha heroics; Spain 27 shots, hit crossbar — shock goalless draw in Atlanta) — ESPN/FOX Sports/FIFA.com
Saudi Arabia 1-1 Uruguay (Al-Amri for KSA; Maxi Araújo equaliser for URU, Miami) — ESPN/FOX Sports/Bolavip/Flashscore/FIFA.com
France 3-1 Senegal (Mbappé brace to become France's record scorer; Olise inspired second half) — FourFourTwo/The Scotsman/NBC News/ESPN
Iraq 1-4 Norway (Iraq = IC Path 2 winner; Haaland brace) — FourFourTwo/The Scotsman/NBC News/ESPN
Argentina 3-0 Algeria (Messi first World Cup hat-trick, ties all-time WC goals record) — FourFourTwo/The Scotsman/NBC News/Al Jazeera
Austria 3-1 Jordan (Group J, Santa Clara) — FourFourTwo/The Scotsman/ESPN
Portugal 1-1 DR Congo (DR Congo = IC Path 1 winner; Ronaldo's side frustrated in Houston) — ESPN/NBC News/FOX Sports
Uzbekistan 1-3 Colombia (Colombia beat World Cup debutants) — ESPN/NBC News/FOX Sports
England 4-2 Croatia (Kane brace incl. 2 pens, Bellingham, Rashford) — CBS Sports/ESPN/Sky Sports/England FA
Ghana 1-0 Panama (late winner, Toronto) — NBC News/ESPN/FOX Sports
